page: Microsoft Azure E128s_v6 is an Esv6-family virtual machine configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs on an x86_64 Intel processor architecture. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, which aligns it with memory-optimized infrastructure standards.

This server type does not include bundled local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage. It is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the E128s_v6 offers a high density of memory relative to its compute resources, making it suitable for workloads requiring large in-memory datasets without the overhead of local storage maintenance. Appropriate workloads include large-scale relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-intensive data processing applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E128s_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Esv6 server family. Powered by dedicated Intel processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 128 dedicated vCPUs and 1024.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The server does not include bundled local storage but is Premium Storage capable, enabling high-throughput external disk configurations. With zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, network access must be configured externally. This resource profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale relational databases, in-memory data analytics, and heavy enterprise resource planning applications that require substantial RAM capacity without the necessity of integrated local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128s_v6 is an Esv6-family virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs and 1024 GB of RAM for large-scale enterprise database workloads.
